purpose: Fill this only if Qwen3-Next cannot be run on the selected NVIDIA host. A replacement must be preregistered before profiling and copied into metadata/native_control_matrix.json before any metric rows are collected.
allowed_use: A feasible replacement preserves the full-matrix requirement. If no replacement is preregistered before profiling, the packet remains audit-only.
architecture_map_requirement: Before profiling, run or extend the hybrid architecture-map extractor for the replacement model, copy the resulting map into the run packet, and record its SHA-256 here. Boundary indices and directions must come from that map, not from manual layer-name guesses.
must_not_do: Do not substitute a pure Transformer or pure SSM model as the cross-family hybrid control.
Do not choose the replacement after seeing Granite primary rows.
Do not promote a Granite-only packet.
Do not change request shape for only the replacement control.
